# FIXplanet — Doorstep Apple Device Repair Service, Bangalore

## About
FIXplanet is Bangalore's trusted independent Apple device repair service. We provide same-day doorstep repair for iPhone, MacBook, iPad, and Apple Watch with a 12-month warranty on all parts and labor.

## Services & Pricing (2026)

### iPhone Repair
- Screen Replacement: ₹3,500 - ₹12,000
- Battery Replacement: ₹2,500 - ₹5,500
- Back Glass Replacement: ₹4,500 - ₹9,000
- Water Damage Recovery: ₹3,000 - ₹15,000
- Charging Port: ₹2,000 - ₹4,000
- Camera Issues: ₹3,500 - ₹8,000

### MacBook Repair
- Display Replacement: ₹12,000 - ₹45,000
- Battery Replacement: ₹8,500 - ₹18,000
- Keyboard Replacement: ₹8,000 - ₹22,000
- Logic Board Repair: ₹8,000 - ₹40,000
- SSD/RAM Upgrade: Variable

### iPad Repair
- Screen Replacement: ₹5,000 - ₹15,000
- Battery Replacement: ₹4,000 - ₹8,000

### Apple Watch Repair
- Screen Replacement: ₹3,000 - ₹8,000
- Battery Replacement: ₹2,500 - ₹5,000

## How It Works
1. Call, WhatsApp, or book online
2. Technician arrives at your location within 30-60 minutes
3. Repair done at your doorstep — watch every step
4. Pay only after satisfaction. 12-month warranty included.

## Contact
- Phone: +91 8105955009
- WhatsApp: +91 8105955009
- Email: hello@fixplanet.in
- Website: https://www.fixplanet.in
- Hours: 9 AM - 9 PM, 7 days a week

## Service Area
All major Bangalore neighborhoods including Koramangala, Indiranagar, Whitefield, HSR Layout, Marathahalli, Bellandur, Electronic City, JP Nagar, Jayanagar, MG Road, Cunningham Road, and 100+ more areas.

## Key Facts
- 4.9★ Google Rating
- 1,000+ devices repaired
- 12-month warranty on all repairs
- OEM-grade parts
- Same-day doorstep service
- Independent Apple specialists (not Apple-authorized)
